But after the death of her military father, she and her mother are in danger of losing their family ranch too. With a little help from friends and their majestic white horse, they hatch a plan to raise enough money to save the ranch while learning to never lose hope, despite all odds.

programme.title: The Book And The Rose
programme.desc: John Barnes is about to go off to war in the 1940s. Before he leaves, he acquires an old book filled with intriguing handwritten notes. He begins a correspondence with its previous owner -- and it promises to be more than just an exchange of letters.

programme.title: Timeless Love
programme.desc: Megan seems to have the perfect life with a wonderful husband named Thomas and 2 adorable children. Then she finds herself awakening from a coma – and discovers she is not and has never been married. But when she meets Thomas for real, she seizes the chance to help him fall in love with her, again—for the first time.

programme.title: Beauty and the Billionaire: Bali
programme.desc: American doctor Ivy Miller lives in Bali, working at a charitable health clinic. When a billionaire benefactor named Dylan Donnelly arrives, Ivy is less than impressed. He is only interested in making himself look better by appearing charitable. Ivy is happy when he goes on his way, but then an accident injures one of Dylan's trusted advisors, Blake. Dylan insists Ivy stay at Dylan's lavish estate in Bali to care for Blake until he's well.

programme.title: Showdown At Williams Creek
programme.desc: A British soldier decides to move to the American frontier and start a new life. He finds the frontier tough and struggles with the climate, thieves and swindlers. He is accused of murder and put on trial.

programme.title: Ultimate Gunfighter
programme.desc: Two family clans have always been enemies they spend their time hating and killing each other. The daughter of the Campos family and the son of the Mounter family fall in love, thus causing further hatred and deaths.

programme.title: Fat Brothers of Trinity
programme.desc: The bizarre adventures of the three gunmen Western grosser, next to a delicate young.

programme.title: Taste of Killing
programme.desc: Dubious Bounty Killer Hank Fellows tracks bank stage coaches to observe them being robbed.

programme.title: Christmas at Pemberly Manor
programme.desc: A NYC event planner butts heads and then falls for a billionaire who is in the process of selling the charming estate she was hoping to use as a venue.

programme.title: Christmas in Wonderland
programme.desc: Starring Matthew Knight and Chris Kattan. Three children and their father move from California to Canada. When they go shopping at the mall, they find counterfeit cash, inadvertently help catch crooks, and make a discovery about Santa.

programme.title: Finding Mrs. Claus
programme.desc: When Mrs. Claus (Mira Sorvino) feels neglected by her less than attentive husband (Will Sasso), she goes to Las Vegas to help a little girl with her Christmas wish.

programme.title: A Christmas Village
programme.desc: To save her reputation, Piper Jensen, a public relations genius and owner of her own PR company, agrees to work for the owner of a failing Santa's Village and discovers love and how magical Christmas is after all.

programme.title: Mea Culpa
programme.desc: Policemen Simon and Franck are celebrating when they cause a fatal car crash. Franck is uninjured but Simon, who was drink-driving, is seriously wounded and loses his job. He struggles to be a father to his son Theo.

programme.title: Berlin I Love You
programme.desc: Latest instalment of the Cities of Love series (Paris, je t'aime / New York, I Love You / Rio, Eu Te Amo), this collective feature film is made of ten stories of romance set in the German capital.

programme.title: Instakiller
programme.desc: When teenager Harper becomes internet famous overnight, mom Layla's worried about the sudden attention – a fear that's justified when Harper is soon stalked online. Before too long the stalking has turned violent and Layla must face down the psychopath who is willing to kill her and her daughter.

programme.title: Spy Cat
programme.desc: Spoiled and innocent, chubby house cat Marnie lives a comfortable and pampered life in the Sunshine household. She has never ventured outside the family home and only knows about the real world through her favourite detective, crime TV-shows. When Paul, who can't stand his sister's spoiled pet, abandons Marnie at a rural petrol station she comes across a loyal band of drifters who join forces to capture a notorious, local gang of petty thieves.

programme.title: Omsch
programme.desc: A travelling artist, painter and filmmaker has a centenarian neighbour. The relationship between this man in his forties and the solitary old lady with a wicked sense of humour gradually becomes a kind of elective kinship. Their discussions, interrupted and picked up again over the years, form the fabric of this personal, tender and surprising film. A calm observation on the inescapable power of the passage of time.

programme.title: One More Time
programme.desc: An 80-year-old actress returns to the small Chilean town of her youth to fulfill her father's dream of creating a TV channel in a place which has never known television.

programme.title: Othello
programme.desc: The Moorish general Othello is manipulated into thinking that his new wife Desdemona has been carrying on an affair with his lieutenant Michael Cassio when in reality it is all part of the scheme of a bitter ensign named Iago.

programme.title: Our Quarantine
programme.desc: In the port of Cagliari, 16 Moroccan workers are governing a ship. They govern their work. They renounce, voluntarily, on their freedom, hoping to preserve their work and to recover the wages in arrears. The ship is their temporary home, where they sleep, eat, pray, observe Ramadan. In Rome a University teacher has “forced” a young student to follow this story. For reasons of study, but also for reasons of “life”. Maybe Salvatore will learn something by this affair. Or maybe not…

programme.title: Parlor, Bedroom and Bath
programme.desc: A man tries passing off a socially awkward fellow as a Casanova in the hopes of marrying off his would be sister-in-law.

programme.title: Maps to the Stars
programme.desc: Benjie, a child star, is shaken when his schizophrenic sister, Agatha, is released from a mental hospital in Florida and returns to Los Angeles, turning the convoluted world of shallow, selfish celebrities and their minions upside down.

programme.title: The Eye
programme.desc: A blind girl receives a cornea transplant so that she is able to see again. However, she gets more than she bargains for when she realizes she can see disturbing ghosts.

programme.title: The Body
programme.desc: A crucified body dated back to the first century A.D is uncovered at an ancient cave in Jerusalem. Trouble ensues as word spreads.

programme.title: Legendary
programme.desc: Cal Chetley is a bright, engaging, undersized fifteen year-old who's been picked on most of his life. Cal joins his high school wrestling team in the hopes his brother will train him. More importantly, Cal uses wrestling as the tool to reunite his family.

programme.title: Occupation Rainfall
programme.desc: From the VFX team behind The Last Jedi and Blade Runner 2049, Occupation Rainfall is a sci-fi action epic with an all star cast including Harry Potter's Jason Isaacs, The Mandalorian's Temuera Morrison and The Hangover's Ken Jeong. After an intergalactic invasion of Earth, where survivors are fighting back in a desperate ground war, the resistance uncover a plot that could see the war come to a decisive end for mankind. With the alien invaders hell-bent on making Earth their new home, the race is on to save the planet. Occupation Rainfall Is an explosive sci-fi extravaganza that grips from start to thrilling finish.

programme.title: Archenemy
programme.desc: Max Fist, who claims to be a hero from another dimension who fell through time and space to earth, where he has no powers.No one believes his stories except for a local teen named Hamster.

programme.title: Upside Down
programme.desc: Ever since Adam (Jim Sturgess) and Eden (Kirsten Dunst) fell in love as teens, their bond has faced astronomical odds. The pair are separated, not just by social class or the political system committed to keeping them apart, but also by a freak planetary condition: they live on twinned, parallel worlds with opposing gravitational forces. Years later, after suffering the pain of being torn apart, Adam decides to set out on a quest to once again find Eden and reconnect with his lost love.

programme.title: The Final Cut
programme.desc: Welcome to the not-too-distant future, where implanted microchips record every single moment of a person's life. Upon death, it becomes the job of a "cutter" like Alan Hakman (Oscar-winner Robin Williams) to edit down the deceased's entire lifetime into a fitting memorial film. For years, he has used his god-like power of final cut to absolve the dead of a multitude of sins. But when, on his latest assignment, he views a terrible secret that can't be erased, Hakman finds his own life in jeopardy in this riveting science fiction thriller.

programme.title: Ice Girls
programme.desc: A figure skater is injured during a competition. A coach that hired her then helps her rehab her injury so that she may live her dream.

programme.title: Eyewitness
programme.desc: It has been five years after Diana send a man to jail for the murder of her father and fiancee. Then he escapes from prison. He keeps her captive in her own home. Did Diana put an innocent man away?

programme.title: WWJD II The Woodcarver
programme.desc: A troubled youth vandalizes a church and winds up in a close association with the woodcarver whose work he destroyed.

programme.title: One Last Dance
programme.desc: In the wake of tragedy, a renowned NY dance company is on the brink of collapse. After leaving the dance world for good, Travis, Chrissa and Max have one last chance to re-connect with the passion and prove that miracles really can happen.

programme.title: Love, Rosie
programme.desc: Rosie and Alex have been best friends since age six. Just as they're discovering the joys of teenage nights on the town, they're also discovering dating disasters. As they dream of travelling the world, they decide to leave their small British town for Boston together to attend university. But fate has other plans, as Rosie discovers that her crazy night out with the most popular boy in school has left her pregnant. She encourages Alex to go to America without her. Over the next twelve years, their lives change in all kinds of ways. Their undeniable connection remains, but can their friendship survive the years and miles?

programme.title: Scarborough
programme.desc: Two mismatched lovers arrive at the British seaside town of Scarborough, seeking an escape from the constraints of real life. Liz, desperately shy and beautiful, seems older than her companion, the happy-go-lucky and impulsive Daz. In their faded hotel room, amongst the peeling wallpaper and away from the prying eyes of their hometown, they laugh, quarrel, make love and enjoy their anonymity. In an identical room in the same hotel, the sensitive artist Aiden and Beth, a fiery and impulsive young woman, tell the same story.

programme.title: Just My Luck
programme.desc: Ashley Albright (LINDSAY LOHAN) is the luckiest woman in the world, a person to whom all the good things in life have come far too easily. She can pick a lottery ticket at random and hit the jackpot. In New York, the world's busiest city, Ashley never has to wait for a cab. And she has a terrific job as an account exec at a prestigious public relations firm. Everything goes Ashley's way. And now, she's been given a great opportunity to advance her career: she is to plan a masquerade ball in downtown Manhattan for record mogul Damon Phillips (Faizon Love) and his company.

programme.title: The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Milo Boyd (Gerard Butler), a down-on-his-luck bounty hunter, gets his dream job when he is assigned to track down his bail-jumping ex-wife, reporter Nicole Hurly (Jennifer Aniston). He thinks all that's ahead is an easy payday, but when Nicole gives him the slip so she can chase a lead on a murder cover-up, Milo realizes that nothing ever goes simply with him and Nicole. The exes continually one-up each other – until they find themselves on the run for their lives. They thought their promise to love, honor and obey was tough – staying alive is going to be a whole lot tougher. Andy Tennant (Hitch, Sweet Home Alabama) directs.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Five teenagers, infused with superhuman abilities, must harness their newfound powers to battle alien invaders

programme.title: Jane Got a Gun
programme.desc: A mother fights to defend her family from being massacred at the hands of a ruthless and violent gang.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Five teenagers, infused with superhuman abilities, must harness their newfound powers to battle alien invaders

programme.title: The Legend Of Hercules
programme.desc: Banished by the king, Hercules harnesses his powers and gathers an army to fight his way back to his kingdom.

programme.title: Adventures of a Private Eye
programme.desc: With renowned private eye Judd Blake away on business, his lacklustre assistant Bob jumps at the chance to prove himself as an equally skilled detective. When a former model is blackmailed by a set of compromising photographs, the well meaning, but inexperienced Bob takes on the case. With a list of eccentric suspects all set to inherit a fortune if the offending pictures should come to light, the naive detective sets about uncovering the blackmailer, but his investigation is continuously hampered by sexy shenanigans. Bob soon finds himself in over his head as he tries to protect his client and solve the mystery.

programme.title: We Still Steal The Old Way
programme.desc: Regarded as the best in the business, The Archer Gang are back in this explosive follow-up to We Still Kill The Old Way. When the infamous 70s underworld legends are tasked with robbing Britain's richest Banker, they are caught mid-heist and sentenced to do time in Britain's toughest prison. Once inside, they encounter their old nemesis Slick Vic Farrow (Billy Murray, Rise of the Footsoldier) who is intent on murdering the gang. Now with the help of a terrifying life sentencer - psychotic serial killer, David, the old-school criminals need to use all their wits to take down Slick Vic, set in motion a heart-stopping, brutal prison riot and stage a daring escape!

programme.title: IP Man: The Awakening
programme.desc: The legendary Ip Man returns to the big screen to uncover the first action-packed chapter in the story of the man who would become a world-renowned martial arts master.

programme.title: Tomorrow Morning
programme.desc: Tomorrow Morning is the story of one couple seen in two separate timelines, a decade apart. This is a story of life, love, misunderstanding and hope... a universal and timeless tale.

programme.title: Call of The Wild
programme.desc: Call of The Wild is a modern-day story incorporating elements of Jack London's classic short novel. Whilst Ryann (Ariel Gade) is staying with her Grandpa Bill (Christopher Lloyd) a wild hybrid wolf/dog shows up injured on the back porch one night. Ryann and a local friend believe they can train the magnificent animal to become a sled dog leader but first they must try and persuade Grandpa, who knows the animal will eventually have to return to the wild. Then they must stand up to the local bully who wants to claim the dog as his own.

programme.title: Escape Room
programme.desc: A mind-bending psychological thriller about a group of friends who find themselves in a sadistic, living nightmare. Six adventurous strangers travel to a mysterious building to experience a game where players compete to solve puzzles to win money. But what starts out as innocent fun soon turns into a suffocating and terrifying game of hell.

programme.title: Bloodthirsty
programme.desc: Frightfest Presents. Ambition can be killer. When an offer to work with one of the greatest music producers of all time comes along, singer Grey cant refuse but her new mentor isnt all that he seems to be. Moving to record her album in a remote location, Grey realises theres a beastly secret lurking. Will her humanity be the price for fame and how much blood will be shed to secure a hit?

programme.title: Pet
programme.desc: When a simple crush leads to an obsession of the deadly kind. Sweetly innocent Seth works in an animal shelter and soon bumps into an old crush. Subsequently he becomes obsessed with her, but after being rejected more than once, he decides to kidnap her and lock her in a cage. But what will the victim have in store for her captor? A perfectly uncomfortable and claustrophobic horror with a twist!

programme.title: Slightly Single in LA
programme.desc: Fun, flirty and downright outrageous. Independent, LA singleton Dale (Lacey Chabert, Mean Girls) is sick and tired of her troublesome love life. On the verge of giving up, she is reunited with an old friend - successful heartthrob and rock star Zach. Is this Dale's lucky chance to fall in love? Also starring Jenna Dewan (Step Up) and Jonathan Bennett (Mean Girls). Perfect for a girls night in!

programme.title: Global Meltdown
programme.desc: After a cataclysmic event causes the Earth's crust to break apart, a helicopter pilot and a scientist lead a band of survivors in search of safety. Stars Michael Paré, Leanne Khol Young (2017)

programme.title: The Box
programme.desc: A couple receive a box and the offer of one million dollars if they push the button within it. But once it has been pushed, someone they do not know will die. Stars Cameron Diaz, James Marsden (2009)

programme.title: Asteroid Final Impact
programme.desc: A disgraced scientist has to use cutting edge satellite technology to save the world from being destroyed by a rogue asteroid. Starring Mark Lutz and Anna Van Hooft (2015).

programme.title: Love by Chance
programme.desc: Claire, a pastry chef, is busy running her new restaurant, but her meddling mother is preoccupied with her lack of love life. Without her knowledge, Claire's mother finds her the perfect man. (2016)

programme.title: Love's Sweet Recipe
programme.desc: Courtney is a talented chef who has taken over the running of the family restaurant. But is her renewed zest for life and her newfound passion for cooking linked to Jake returning home? (2021)

programme.title: Together Forever Tea
programme.desc: Lara discovers a dream her late aunt never fulfilled. With the help of a handsome local, her journey through the sleepy town of Kissing Falls takes her on an unexpected path

programme.title: Designed with Love
programme.desc: Sky gets an exciting offer for her clothing line to be featured in a department store. But first, she must prove that she can make $10k worth of sales. (2020)

programme.title: THE STORY OF US
programme.desc: Jamie owns a bookstore called True Love and has helped couples fall in love.

programme.title: Hangman
programme.desc: Decorated homicide detective Ray Archer (Al Pacino) partners with criminal profiler Will Ruiney (Karl Urban) to catch one of the city's notoriously vicious serial killers, who is playing a twisted version of murder inspired by the children's game Hangman.

programme.title: Feed
programme.desc: Olivia and Matthew Grey, 18-year-old twins born into a world of privilege and high expectations. There are almost no boundaries between them even their dreams are connected.

programme.title: The Beaver
programme.desc: Two-time Academy Award winner Jodie Foster directs and co-stars with two-time Academy Award winner Mel Gibson in The Beaver - an emotional story about a man on a journey to re-discover his family and re-start his life.
"21" is the fact-based story about six MIT students who were trained to become experts in card counting and subsequently took Vegas casinos for millions in winnings.

programme.title: The Quick and the Dead
programme.desc: A female gunslinger arrives in a small town determined to settle an old score.

programme.title: Blue Thunder
programme.desc: A tough but straight-arrow cop battles a group of military and government elitists who have developed an extraordinary helicopter into the ultimate weapon.

programme.title: Sniper (1993)
programme.desc: A seasoned sniper and a rookie marksman are teamed in the Panamanian jungle to eliminate some bad guys. but they also must fight against rogue CIA agents, mercenaries and drug cartel members.

programme.title: Berry Gordy's The Last Dragon
programme.desc: An enjoyable pastiche of martial arts, romance, music, and video, THE LAST DRAGON presents a likable young hero, Leroy (Taimak), who aspires to become a kung fu master. Trouble arises in the form of a huge man who calls himself "Sho' Nuff, who is determined to prove himself the kung fu master of the neighborhood.

programme.title: The Wedding Ringer
programme.desc: After a barbershop manager advises his best friend to break off his engagement, he unexpectedly falls in love with the jilted fiancee, testing both his new romance and his friendship.

programme.title: Excess Baggage
programme.desc: Alicia Silverstone (Clueless) stars in this romantic comedy about a woman who tries to get back at her father by faking her own kidnapping. When her harebrained scheme gets her locked in the trunk of her own car, she falls into a relationship with a car thief (Benicio Del Toro).

programme.title: It Could Happen To You
programme.desc: Much to the horror of his upwardly mobile wife, a New York City cop makes good on his promise to split his lottery winnings with a waitress in this delightful comedy. Money changes everything, and all three lives are transformed in this charming comedy.

programme.title: The Meddler
programme.desc: An aging widow from New York City follows her daughter to Los Angeles in hopes of starting a new life after her husband passes away.

programme.title: American Traitor: The Trial of Axis Sally
programme.desc: American Traitor follows the life of American woman Mildred Gillars (Meadow Williams) and her lawyer (Al Pacino), who struggles to redeem her reputation.

programme.title: Manifesto (2015)
programme.desc: "Manifesto" pays homage to the moving tradition and literary beauty of artistic manifestos, ultimately questioning the role of the artist in society today. Performing these 'new manifestos' as a contemporary call to action while inhabiting thirteen different personas, Academy Award winner-Cate Blanchett imbues new dramatic life into both famous and lesser-known words in unexpected contexts.

programme.title: A Memory In My Heart
programme.desc: Rebecca Vega doesn't remember anything of her life prior to waking up in a hospital eight years ago. Now that she and her husband Joe have begun trying to have a child, she has been plagued with headaches and recurring nightmares. After a fateful encounter with a curious stranger who claims to recognize her, Rebecca's memory is jolted when she sees a picture of herself and her three children. Armed with only the photo, the location of a small town, and the name Chase Stewart, Rebecca sets out to find some answers. Refusing to be intimidated by Stewart's threats and schemes, Rebecca slowly but surely uncovers the facts that allow her to reclaim her children and her past.

programme.title: La Vie En Rose
programme.desc: From the slums of Paris to the limelight of New York, Edith Piaf's life was a battle to sing and survive, live and love. Raised in poverty, Edith's magical voice and her passionate romances and friendships with the greatest names of the period - Yves Montand, Jean Cocteau, Charles Aznavour, Marlene Dietrich, Marcel Cerdan and others - made her a star all around the world. But in her audacious attempt to tame her tragic destiny, the Little Sparrow - her nickname - flew so high she could not fail to burn her wings.

programme.title: The Good, the Bad, the Weird
programme.desc: Set in the 1930's Manchurian desert where lawlessness rules, three Korean men fatefully meet each other on a train. Do-Won (Jung Woo-sung) is a bounty hunter who tracks down dangerous criminals. Chang- yi (Lee Byung-hun) is the leader of a group of tough-as-nails bandits. Tae-goo (Song Kang-ho) is a train robber with nine lives. The three strangers engage in a chase across Manchuria to take possession of a map Tae-goo discovers while robbing the train. Also on the hunt for the mysterious map are the Japanese army and Manchurian bandits. In this unpredictable, escalating battle for the map, who will stand as the winner in the end?

programme.title: Apex Predator
programme.desc: Let the hunt begin. Serving a life sentence for a crime he did not commit, Jim (Bruce Willis - Die Hard, McClane) is offered a chance of freedom. But the price of freedom could be his life as he finds himself face to face with the world's greatest hunters… traps, guerilla warfare and all out violence. Will Jim survive this murderous game of cat and mouse or will the hunters discover just how far he will go to survive APEX? Also starring Neal McDonough (Minority Report) and Alexia Fast (Jack Reacher), Apex Predator was written and directed by Edward Drake (Broil) with additional writing from Corey Large (Anti-Life).

programme.title: Elektra
programme.desc: From the pages of Marvel Comics — creators of X-Men and Spider-Man — comes ELEKTRA, the first action-event movie of the year. In the ultimate battle between good and evil stands a warrior who makes the choice that tips the balance.

programme.title: Birth of the Dragon
programme.desc: In the world of martial arts, there is one man above all: Bruce Lee. San Francisco, 1965. Young, hungry and looking for an opportunity to make a name for himself, Lee (Philip Ng) challenges legendary Shaolin monk and kung fu master, Wong Jack Man (Yu Xia), to a fight when he hears that he's crossing the Pacific to observe the state of kung fu in America. Their legendary fight would change the history of martial arts forever.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: In this live action movie-length version of the famous four, The Evil Shredder has returned to cause more mayhem and kidnaps the rat Ninja Master. But the Turtles have been armed with Professor Perry's Anti Mutant antidote and, with the help of a journalist, embark on an adventure to save the Ninja Master.

programme.title: Climate Frontlines: Frontier Town

programme.title: Frontier Vets
programme.desc: Roxanne let her puppy case, ‘Ripple' stay overnight at the dorm. The group – especially her roommate Charlotte - is critical of this. Not only is she using the dog as a social crutch, it's highly unprofessional to become so attached to a patient.

programme.title: Frontier Vets
programme.desc: Dr. Greg forces the students to attend a local Heritage Festival – something none of them are in the mood for on their ‘day off'. But will their attitudes change after witnessing the South African dance and folk customs?

programme.title: Frontier Vets
programme.desc: The group discovers Roxanne's childhood fear of lizards. Niven takes the opportunity to exploit it.

programme.title: Frontier Vets
programme.desc: Agatha is feeling motivated again only to learn that she actually failed her exams and must leave the residency.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Kristina travels back to Zimbabwe's stunning lake Kariba. This time she's touring the area on the luxurious Karabezi Houseboat Cruiser. Joined by fishing experts, Craig and Mark, she attempts to catch the infamous tiger fish. The shoreline sights never disappoint as she witnesses lion and fish eagles on the hunt. Kristina challenges her fishing guide, Dollar, to a fishing competition and lands her biggest fish yet!

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Hosted by Rhino Safari Camp, the epic safari continues back in the Matusadona National Park where Kristina is guided by Steve. They explore the lake-shore, encounter the hungry local pride and Marula, the resident elephant, makes a lunch-time appearance.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Kristina travels to Gonarezhou National Park in the South-East of Zimbabwe. Thomas, her guide, takes her to the breath-taking Chilojo cliffs, tracks an impressive buffalo herd and keeps his cool as they experience heart-stopping elephant charges. Will Kristina finally spot her dream leopard?

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Craig joins Kristina at Sango Lodge in the heart of the Save Valley Conservancy where they explore the vast, rugged wilderness. Kristina joins Byrce Clemence and his anti-poaching team as they demonstrate the effectiveness of the anti-poaching dog unit. Tracking notorious rhino on foot keeps their senses alert. Find out what causes the crew to hit the floor.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Back on the banks of Lake Kariba, Kristina is hosted by the luxurious Bumi Hills Safari Lodge. She tracks lions with her guide Madison, witness elephants swimming and challenges Madison to a fishing bet and finally gets to tick an elusive cat off her bucket list.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: The safari continues at Bumi Hills Safari Lodge where Kristina joins the anti-poaching unit on their everyday, thrilling duties. The fishing challenges with Madison continue and the breath-taking lakeshore game viewing experiences keep coming.

programme.title: Frontier Vets
programme.desc: The vet students meet for the first time and travel 7 hours to the remote clinic. We learn about their fears and insecurities -- fear of failure and the weight of responsibilities ahead.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Kristina travels back to Mana Pools to experience the untamed wilderness in the extreme dry season. Her guide, Cloud, takes her on an expedition to find lion cubs and wild dog puppies. Will they find what they are looking for?

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Still based at Zambezi Expeditions Camp, Richard guides Kristina into her closest encounter with a wild bull elephant. An evening excursion to Kanga Pan leads to breath-taking sightings of elusive creatures of the night

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Kristina heads to Camp Amalinda on the edge of the Matopos National Park. Her guide, Dardley, shares some of the history of this World Heritage Site and intriguing rock paintings. They track white rhino on foot and she learns about the distinctive rock formations.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Dardley joins Kristina at Ivory Lodge on the edge of Hwange National Park where her predator sightings just keep getting better. They get unbelievably close to wild cheetah and witness something incredible.

programme.title: Hummingbirds: Jewelled Messengers
programme.desc: Hummingbirds live at the limits of what is possible. They have the highest metabolism with a heart rate of 1,200 beats per minute of any vertebrate. Their wings beat 50 times a second. They can hover on the spot, and even fly backwards. To our eyes, they are just a blur. But with the aid of high-speed cameras we can slow down their hyperactive lives and look into their secret world.

programme.title: The Secret of Migrating Birds
programme.desc: Each year in spring, Israel witnesses a unique spectacle. Many millions of migrating birds cross the land bridge between Africa, Asia and Europe.Their first major roosting place after an exhausting nonstop flight over the African deserts is in southern Israel – a vital stopover. Here they replenish their energy reserves. The flocks of migrating birds are pursued by flocks of ornithologists. Hundreds of birders flood into the port city of Eilat on the Red Sea to take part in the Migration Festival. For a week, Israel's southernmost coastal resort is home to international scientists and amateur birders.

programme.title: Snowy Owl: Queen of the North
programme.desc: No other owls are capable of surviving the extreme conditions, whereas the snowy owl is able to hunt through six months of bright sunshine and six months of twilight. This film follows a pair of snowy owls as they breed on the tundra of the High Arctic, 300 miles inside the Arctic Circle. Lemming numbers are low this year. Five owlets hatch and they face a struggle if any are going to survive.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: In the earth's polar regions, a ghostly flicker and colourful glow often brighten the night sky. Whoever sees an aurora event will never forget this impressive experience. Finland's Saami people, Alaska's Inuit, Canada's Native Americans and New Zealand's Maori all have legends about the origins and meaning of this magic natural spectacle. These stories tell of spirits dancing in the sky, of a bright and better world where hunting game is abundant, of battling gods and celestial messages.

programme.title: Billion Dollar Fish
programme.desc: They are virtually unchanged from their ancestors, who swam in ancient rivers when the dinosaurs still ruled the planet. Their unfertilised eggs became black gold, served in only the most expensive restaurants as caviar. This ancient giant is the Beluga Sturgeon, considered by some to be the largest freshwater fish in the world. Sturgeons are now at the very edge of extinction because of the exclusive market for their eggs, but only the eggs can allow the species to live. Paradoxically, the desire for caviar may now be the only chance they have for their future existence.

programme.title: Unnatural Selection
programme.desc: The wings of cliff swallows in Nebraska are getting shorter – while female turtles in Chesapeake Bay are getting larger. On the Galapagos Islands, two species of finches are developing back into one. Increasing numbers of peregrine falcons are living in urban areas – and have adapted their behaviour: thanks to the city lights, they have learned to hunt at night.

programme.title: Lions On The Move: Practice Makes Perfect
programme.desc: Kevin Richardson shares an extraordinary bond with Africa's most fearsome predators. Together with them, he has experienced some real adventures. However, transporting 27 lions and 14 hyenas to a new home presents a different challenge.The lions' new home will be a sanctuary on the edge of Dinokeng, a South African game reserve spanning 18,000 square metres. The huge task ahead includes planning and designing the new enclosures, and securing permits to move the animals.

programme.title: Python Hunters

programme.title: Super Senses
programme.desc: We find out about the animals that live in the shadows and the adaptations they need to survive. Nocturnal animals have taken to this dark world for good reason. You need some special abilities to cope with the lack of light.

programme.title: Super Senses
programme.desc: We find out more about the animals that have their feet firmly planted on or under the ground. And find out how their senses are tuned to survive. What we see above the ground is only a small part of the natural world.

programme.title: Super Senses
programme.desc: Animals use communication to attract mates,warn off predators, defend territory, or trick their prey. And of course, it's the senses that play the key role - Sight, smell, taste, touch, and hearing - all are employed to send signals to others.

programme.title: Super Senses
programme.desc: In this last episode of Super Senses we take the grand final tour to see the greatest of all the special weapons that help some animals to govern the wilderness. In this episode we see it, hear it, touch it, smell it and taste it like animals do.

programme.title: Wild Walk
programme.desc: The baboon human conflict in the western cape has taken an ugly turn with many of the cape peninsulas chacmas either being trapped and relocated or killed. Swati walks with baboons to find out what is causing this conflict and to look for solutions

programme.title: Wild Walk
programme.desc: Can wilderness be brought back to a land that has been overgrazed and farmed? The Karoo was once extensive across south Africa and home to a rich diversity of flora and fauna. Swati takes a wild walk there to see if the conservation plan is working

programme.title: Wild Walk
programme.desc: Can captive bred ambassador cheetahs of the Cheetah Outreach in Cape Town can help save their counterparts in the wild? Swati finds out if the motto of Cheetah Outreach, see it, Sense it, Save it, can help the wild cheetah?

programme.title: Wild Walk
programme.desc: Can the African elephant evers be tamed? Is it possible to sustain an entire tourism industry based on them being domesticated? Swati walks with the elephants of Knysna park while these questions are asked.

programme.title: Wild And Alive

programme.title: SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 14, Greece
programme.desc: Taking place in Corinth, Greece, considered by many the cradle of the sports competition games, an epic strongman battle will mark the last stage before the upcoming big two-day season's finale in Chetumal, Mexico. In front of more than 5000 spectators, the twelve athletes compete in Log Lifts, Card Deadlift, Conan's Wheel and Loading.

programme.title: SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 15, Mexico World Finals (Part 1)
programme.desc: The first day of the two-part finale sees the strongest men competing in Carry and Drag, Dumbbell Lift and the Truck Pull. Everything is possible in this heated fight for the crown against the backdrop of stunning Chetumal, Mexico.

programme.title: SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 16, Mexico World Finals (Part 2)
programme.desc: On the second day of the grand finale of the 2017 Strongman Champions League, the athletes have a last chance to secure the medals in the spectacular four events Weight for Height, Deadlift Cars, Forward Hold and The Loading Medley. Be prepared for stunning performances – and even world records!

programme.title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 1, Norway
programme.desc: Season 2018 begins with 14 strongest men in the world, all competing for the title. The competition kicks off in Norway. We'll see typical Viking disciplines, team events and world records in heavy conditions in the land of snow and ice. They will suffer, they will freeze and fight in this first competition of the year for the title that they will carry on their shoulders throughout whole year.

programme.title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 2, Germany
programme.desc: The next stop in strongest league of the world is muscle capital, largest number of strong shoulders per capichampions league on the planet. It's a FIBO - the biggest expo on planet Earth and the second stage of 2018 Strongman champions league, in Cologne, Germany.

programme.title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 3, Abu Dhabi
programme.desc: For the first time in history, Strongman Champions League will set up competition in Abu Dhabi. The line-up of super athletes, who are part of the SCL, includes former world champions Dainis Zageris (Latvia) & Krzysztof Radzikowski (Poland), current world champion Matjaz Belsak (Slovenia) and biggest strongman in the World Sean O'Hagan (Ireland).

programme.title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 4, Holland (Part 1)
programme.desc: Strongman classic in land where there is no place for anything else excepts strength, fight and endurance. Here are fourteen of the strongest men, fighting for the title of strongest in Holland.
